root: ^A wave of cold air hits you. The day's last sunlight penetrates the tree tops, and the dulcet tones of the forest are drowned out by the low pitched growl of the passing traffic.
^Your Honda Civic '89 has ceased functioning on the side of the road. Not exactly an uncommon occurrence considering all it’s been through.
^At least I managed to pull over.

c-0: ^At least I managed to pull over, you think. Neither my insurance nor body could withstand a high speed car crash.
c-1: ^Your frustration does not help. The car is still not working.

c-2: ^That could take a few hours. You need to get to that crime scene immediately. You can try fixing the problem yourself.

c-0: ^No, you really can't. Get this thing running again, or resign from your department effective immediately from pure shame.

g-1: ^Pop that hood and have a look, it can't be that difficult.
